## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss improvements to outline generation and address issues with client content workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outline generation is ignoring proposed structures in assignment briefs, leading to suboptimal content organization](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Strapi's content mix (programmatic vs. editorial) needs clarification to better define scope and deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Looker Studio reports will be implemented to improve data visualization and reporting for clients](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Additional content manager hiring is needed to handle increasing client workload](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

## Topics

### Outline Generation Issues

  - [Assignment briefs' proposed structures are being ignored in outline generation](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [H2s in generated outlines are often too fluffy and don't build upon each other logically](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Outlines sometimes include irrelevant sections or poor organization](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Generated articles occasionally have structural issues (e.g., H3s directly following H2s without text in between)](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)

### Client-Specific Content Workflows

  - [Strapi's content mix (programmatic vs editorial) needs clarification](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=2489.0)
  - [RunPod outline generation struggled with vague keywords and over-structuring](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Abnormal Security's generated content tends to be too flowery and lacks scannable headers](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)

### Reporting and Data Visualization

  - [Implementing Looker Studio reports for improved data presentation](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Reports will include metrics like impressions, clicks, and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Data will be sliced by website path and content origin (client's existing vs. GrowthX-produced)](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

### Team Expansion and Workload Management

  - [Need for an additional Content Manager identified](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Preference for full-time writers over freelancers to maintain quality and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Potential large clients (e.g., Webflow) necessitate increased team capacity](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to provide detailed feedback on outline generation issues, including 2-3 examples](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=2742.0)
  - [Implement Looker Studio reports for client data visualization](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Clarify Strapi's content mix (programmatic vs. editorial) and adjust workflow accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=2489.0)
  - [Jason to review pricing and packaging, considering new product offerings for traffic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Explore hiring options for additional Content Manager position](https://fathom.video/share/upMaeHTiDqg3irKZpxEqsaJTkii_P5oV?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
